nasb.text: Yet they did not listen to Me or incline their ear, but stiffened their neck; they did more evil than their fathers.

esv.text: Yet they did not listen to me or incline their ear, but stiffened their neck. They did worse than their fathers.

cnv.text: 你們卻沒有聽從，毫不留心，反倒硬著頸項行惡，比你們的列祖還厲害。

ccb.text: 但你们掩耳不听，顽固不化，比你们的祖先更邪恶。
